title: tarenna scaberula
intro: Tarenna scaberula, also known as the Rough-leaved Tarenna, is a plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae, native to the tropical regions of Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds such as alkaloids and flavonoids. The health benefits of Tarenna scaberula include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Tarenna scaberula can be prepared as a herbal tea or a decoction, and it is also used in traditional medicine to make various remedies, such as ointments and salves, to treat skin conditions and wounds.
